evals.expected_output: The skill should scan all current changes, run quality gates (lint, type check, tests) in parallel for backend and frontend, check for migration files and run Supabase MCP advisory checks if found, diff env vars against production, stage and commit changes, create a PR, merge to main, deploy to both Cloud Run (canary strategy) and Vercel, verify health endpoints, compare performance baselines, and report final status. Should use TaskCreate to track all 14 phases.

assertions.text: Runs git status and git diff to scan changes
Runs ruff check and ruff format for Python lint
Runs ty check for Python type checking
Runs pytest for unit and integration tests
Creates tasks to track pipeline phases
Checks for migration files in supabase/migrations/
Attempts to create a git commit with structured message
Attempts to create a PR using gh pr create
Attempts deployment to Cloud Run and Vercel
Checks health endpoints after deployment

evals.prompt: I just finished adding a new braindump_sessions table with a migration file. Deploy everything to production and make sure the database is clean.
evals.expected_output: The skill should detect the migration file in supabase/migrations/, run the full Supabase MCP migration workflow (list_projects, list_migrations, list_tables, apply_migration, get_advisors for both security and performance), remediate any advisory issues (especially missing RLS on the new table), then proceed with the full deployment pipeline including canary strategy on Cloud Run and verification.

assertions.text: Detects migration files in the changeset
Uses mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__list_projects to find project ID
Uses mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__list_migrations to check current state
Uses mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__apply_migration to apply new migration
Uses mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__get_advisors with type security
Uses mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__get_advisors with type performance
Checks Postgres logs after migration
Proceeds with deployment after migration is validated

evals.prompt: push everything to prod, but I'm a bit worried because I changed a lot of files across the backend agents and the frontend config page. Make sure nothing breaks.
evals.expected_output: The skill should flag the large number of changes (>20 files), run parallel quality gates for both backend and frontend, diff environment variables against both Cloud Run and Vercel, use canary deployment strategy on Cloud Run (10% -> 50% -> 100%), capture performance baselines before deploying, compare post-deploy metrics, and auto-rollback if health checks fail after retries.

assertions.text: Warns about large number of changed files
Runs backend and frontend quality gates
Performs environment variable diff before deploying
Captures performance baselines before deployment
Uses canary deployment strategy for Cloud Run
Compares post-deploy performance against baselines
Has rollback strategy if deployment fails
